title: Senior Software Engineer - ABB India International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - ABB India International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
ABB India International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ABB India International Enterprises:
ABB India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India International Enterprises!
